title: selliguea triloba
intro: Selliguea triloba, also known as Tawa or Polypodium mindorense, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selliguea triloba include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used in the form of capsules or tablets, making it a versatile and accessible treatment option for various health conditions.
